title: Find the Smallest Divisor Given a Threshold
hints: Notice that as d increases, the sum of ceilings decreases. This monotonicity suggests searching for the smallest valid d.
Use binary search on the possible values of d to efficiently find the minimum divisor that satisfies the threshold condition.
Define a helper function to compute the sum of ceilings for a given d, then binary search between 1 and the maximum value in nums.
